💡 Did You Know?
🩸

Pairing sesame or pumpkin seeds with vitamin C-rich foods can triple the iron absorption rate.

👅

Low zinc impairs taste, smell, and immune response — often without any obvious symptoms.

🦋

Selenium deficiency can impair thyroid hormone conversion (T4→T3), slowing metabolism.

🦴

Sesame seeds contain more calcium per gram than whole milk.

💧

Chia seeds absorb up to 12× their own weight in water, making them one of nature's most powerful hydration aids.

🧠

Magnesium from seeds supports over 300 enzyme reactions in the body, including those that regulate sleep and stress.

⚠️ Reached maximum safe consumable quantity — consuming more can harm digestion.
